enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses a playful and joyous sentiment, celebrating life's little moments and the excitement of love.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Meyaadha Maan, this song highlights the protagonist's carefree attitude and adds a fun element to the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ka Ka Bala and composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was this song released?

Enga Veetu Kuththu Vizhakku was released on January 18, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Enga Veetu Kuththu Vizhakku from Meyaadha Maan is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the joy of celebration and love. It showcases the protagonist's playful spirit and carefree nature, making it a perfect anthem for parties and joyous occasions. The catchy tune and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, this song is a delightful addition to the film's vibrant soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enga Veetu Kuththu Vizhakku from Meyaadha Maan is a vibrant and lively track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. With Ka Ka Bala's energetic vocals and Santhosh Narayanan's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the joyous vibe of this melody that resonates with the spirit of fun and festivity!
stanzaMeanings: No matter how many births I take, I will search for you, my dear, I will run away.
If I had a handbag, I would have kept it on your shoulder. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
If I had a handbag, I would have kept it on your body.
If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
No matter how many births I take, I will search for you, my dear, I will run away.
tomu tomu tom tommu, my dear, in the pot, there is sweet pudding..
If I had a bag, oh no! I would have been in your arms. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
If I had a bag, I would have been in your arms.
If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
If I had a handkerchief, I would have been in your hand.

If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
If I had a teddy bear, I would have hugged you tight. If you are with me, my life will be fulfilled.
